Block Island · Rhode Island

A Modern
Oceanside Escape.

Perched atop the highest point of Old Harbor — six acres of rolling lawn, careful gardens, and ocean beyond.

Reserve a Stay Discover the Inn
Est. 1879
Renovated 2025
Check Availability
No. 01 — The Inn

A peaceful setting just outside everything.

The Atlantic Inn sits in quiet surroundings of rolling lawns and carefully tended gardens — with stunning water views and fresh ocean breezes.

Six acres above Old Harbor. Twenty-three rooms and suites blending Victorian charm with modern luxury. A Chef-driven restaurant. A famous veranda where afternoons stretch into evenings, and the boats come and go below.

It's a coastal retreat the way coastal retreats used to feel — and the way the very best ones still do.

23 Rooms & Suites
6ac Manicured Grounds
1879 Established
§
No. 02 — The Atmosphere

Twenty-three rooms.
One unforgettable view.

A few moments on the lawn. The veranda at golden hour. The kind of place that makes you slow down without meaning to.

The Atlantic Inn — New Shoreham, RI Spring through Autumn
No. 03 — Accommodations

Victorian charm,
modernized.

Newly remodeled, our 23 air-conditioned rooms and suites blend antique furniture and elegant fabrics with thoughtfully curated modern luxuries. Every room is uniquely decorated. Every room offers a sweeping view — of the island, the ocean, or the surrounding fields.

Explore all rooms & suites

The Ocean Suites

King · Sea View

Our largest accommodations. King beds, en suite baths, and uninterrupted views of the Atlantic from a private window seat.

View Suite

The Garden Rooms

Queen · Field View

Floral wallpapers, antique trunks, and pastel green casework framing views of the surrounding fields.

View Room

The Seaside Rooms

Queen · Island View

Vintage lamps, a clean white bed, a window framing seaside green — quiet, characterful, and well-appointed.

View Room

The Manor Residence

Whole-House Stay

A separate, four-bedroom residence with its own paneled living room, full kitchen, and private grounds — for families and gatherings.

View The Manor
No. 04 — The Atlantic Restaurant

Ever-changing menus. Locally sourced.

Chef Francis Cavanagh leads our kitchen with menus that shift with what the island and its purveyors have on hand — quietly inventive, deeply seasonal, and always grounded in place.

— Chef Francis Cavanagh
2024 OpenTable

No. 05 — Gather

Weddings, weekends,
and the long lunch.

— A Special Wedding

Memorable on a grand scale.

Create unique and unforgettable memories of your wedding or special event by holding it at The Atlantic Inn — six acres, sweeping views, and a setting unlike anywhere on Block Island.

Plan Your Day
— Meetings & Events

A space for every occasion.

Intimate dinners, off-sites, milestone gatherings — all set against the inn's warm, paneled rooms and famous veranda.

Inquire
Live music every Saturday

Saturday & Sunday lunch.

Make your weekends more flavorful — join us for lunch on Saturdays and Sundays, 11:30 to 3:00.

No. 06 — The Veranda

Life is better
by the beach.

Relax and unwind on our famous veranda and manicured lawns. It is always a magical experience at the Atlantic Inn — boats entering and leaving Old Harbor, a sunset draped over the island, the steady soundtrack of the sea.

No. 08 — Block Island

An island unto itself.

Twelve square miles of cliffs, harbors, beaches, and rolling moors — a National Wildlife Refuge, a string of historic lighthouses, and an unhurried rhythm you can feel the moment you step off the ferry.

The Atlantic sits at the highest point above Old Harbor, on the island's east side — minutes from town, the beaches, the bluffs, and everything Block Island has to offer.
